## Phase Boundary

Users see the optimal component purchase order for each recommended item, with reasoning for why to buy each component in that order, adapting to game state. Mixed backend+frontend phase: backend provides component data and Claude generates ordering reasoning, frontend displays component steps with GSI gold highlighting.
